_meta.dna: iphone(native) = swiftui(modern) x app_store(distributed) x simulator(tested) x keychain(integrated) x notifications(apns) x privacy(atl) x handoff(continuity)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor lists 7 seed questions. iPhone users have high expectations for polish, privacy, and App Store compliance. These questions prepare for MVP+1 mobile deployment. Set up now, implement after desktop MVP ships. Apple's review process is strict — every question anticipates App Store requirements.
_meta.implementation_status: SETUP_ONLY — implement after MVP desktop launch

name: Tower of iPhone
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM
